---
title: "Extended Data — DE gene overlaps and scDist full results"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
```

```{r setup_libraries_data}
library(Seurat)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)
BASE_SIZE <- 8
out_dir <- here::here("output_figures/paper/extended_figures/overlaps/")
dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

targets::tar_config_set(store = here::here("_targets"))
targets::tar_load(arc_diet_labeled)
targets::tar_load(hfdveh_celldist)
targets::tar_load(fastveh_celldist)
targets::tar_load(lepip_celldist)
targets::tar_load(celltypes_diet)
```

## Leptin IP × Diet gene overlap (Supplementary Figure)

```{r overlap_venn, fig.width=6, fig.height=5}
lep_de <- read.csv(here::here("output_figures/paper/figure2/tables/glp1r_leptin_degs_wt.csv"))
diet_de <- read.csv(here::here("output_figures/paper/figure2/tables/diet_degenes.csv"))

lep_up <- lep_de$gene[lep_de$adj.P.Val < 0.05 & lep_de$logFC > 0]
lep_dn <- lep_de$gene[lep_de$adj.P.Val < 0.05 & lep_de$logFC < 0]

d12 <- diet_de %>% filter(ct == "12")
hfd_up <- d12$gene[d12$FDR < 0.05 & d12$logFC.treatmentHFD > 0]
hfd_dn <- d12$gene[d12$FDR < 0.05 & d12$logFC.treatmentHFD < 0]

# Concordant overlaps
up_overlap <- intersect(lep_up, hfd_up)
dn_overlap <- intersect(lep_dn, hfd_dn)

# Create data for upset-style visualization
bg <- intersect(lep_de$gene, d12$gene)
overlap_df <- data.frame(
    gene = bg,
    Leptin_up = bg %in% lep_up,
    Leptin_dn = bg %in% lep_dn,
    HFD_up = bg %in% hfd_up,
    HFD_dn = bg %in% hfd_dn
)

# Scatter plot: leptin IP logFC vs HFD logFC
merged <- lep_de %>%
    dplyr::select(gene, lep_logFC = logFC, lep_padj = adj.P.Val) %>%
    inner_join(d12 %>% dplyr::select(gene, hfd_logFC = logFC.treatmentHFD, hfd_fdr = FDR), by = "gene") %>%
    mutate(
        category = case_when(
            lep_padj < 0.05 & hfd_fdr < 0.05 & sign(lep_logFC) == sign(hfd_logFC) ~ "Concordant",
            lep_padj < 0.05 & hfd_fdr < 0.05 & sign(lep_logFC) != sign(hfd_logFC) ~ "Discordant",
            lep_padj < 0.05 ~ "Leptin only",
            hfd_fdr < 0.05 ~ "HFD only",
            TRUE ~ "NS"
        )
    )

cat_cols <- c("Concordant" = "#E74C3C", "Discordant" = "#3498DB",
              "Leptin only" = "#F39C12", "HFD only" = "#2ECC71", "NS" = "grey85")

p_scatter <- ggplot(merged, aes(hfd_logFC, lep_logFC, color = category)) +
    geom_point(data = ~filter(.x, category == "NS"), size = 0.3, alpha = 0.3) +
    geom_point(data = ~filter(.x, category != "NS"), size = 1, alpha = 0.7) +
    scale_color_manual(values = cat_cols) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, lty = 2, color = "grey50") +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, lty = 2, color = "grey50") +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    labs(x = "log2FC (HFD vs Chow)", y = "log2FC (Leptin vs Vehicle)",
         title = "Lepr/Glp1r neurons") +
    annotate("text", x = max(merged$hfd_logFC) * 0.7, y = max(merged$lep_logFC) * 0.9,
             label = paste0("Concordant: ", sum(merged$category == "Concordant")),
             size = 2.5, color = "#E74C3C")

ggsave(paste0(out_dir, "lepip_hfd_overlap_scatter.pdf"), plot = p_scatter, h = 5, w = 6)

# Fisher's exact stats
cat("Concordant up:", length(up_overlap), "\n")
cat("Concordant dn:", length(dn_overlap), "\n")

write_csv(merged, paste0(out_dir, "lepip_hfd_overlap_genes.csv"))
```

## Venn diagram — leptin IP vs DIO DEGs

```{r venn_lepip_hfd, fig.width=4, fig.height=4}
library(VennDiagram)

lep_sig <- lep_de$gene[lep_de$adj.P.Val < 0.05]
hfd_sig <- d12$gene[d12$FDR < 0.05]

n_lep <- length(lep_sig)
n_hfd <- length(hfd_sig)
n_overlap <- length(intersect(lep_sig, hfd_sig))
n_bg <- length(bg)

# Fisher's exact test for enrichment of overlap
a <- n_overlap
b <- n_hfd - n_overlap
c <- n_lep - n_overlap
d <- n_bg - n_lep - n_hfd + n_overlap
cont <- matrix(c(max(a,0), max(b,0), max(c,0), max(d,0)), nrow = 2)
fisher_res <- fisher.test(cont, alternative = "greater")
fisher_p <- fisher_res$p.value

p_venn <- draw.pairwise.venn(
    area1 = n_lep,
    area2 = n_hfd,
    cross.area = n_overlap,
    category = c("Leptin IP DEGs", "DIO DEGs"),
    fill = c("#F39C12", "#2ECC71"),
    alpha = 0.5,
    cat.cex = 0.9,
    cex = 1.2,
    cat.pos = c(-30, 30),
    cat.dist = c(0.05, 0.05),
    fontfamily = "sans",
    cat.fontfamily = "sans",
    sub = sprintf("Fisher's exact p = %.2e", fisher_p),
    sub.cex = 0.8
)

pdf(paste0(out_dir, "lepip_hfd_venn.pdf"), width = 4, height = 4)
grid.draw(p_venn)
grid.text(sprintf("Fisher's exact p = %.2e", fisher_p),
          x = 0.5, y = 0.05, gp = gpar(fontsize = 8))
dev.off()

cat("Leptin IP DEGs:", n_lep, "\n")
cat("HFD DEGs:", n_hfd, "\n")
cat("Overlap:", n_overlap, "\n")
cat("Background genes tested:", n_bg, "\n")
cat("Fisher's exact p-value:", fisher_p, "\n")
cat("Odds ratio:", fisher_res$estimate, "\n")
```

## scDist full results — all clusters

```{r scdist_full, fig.width=8, fig.height=5}
# Extract results dataframes from scDist list objects
hfd_dist <- hfdveh_celldist$results %>%
    rownames_to_column("cell_type") %>%
    mutate(comparison = "HFD vs Chow")

fast_dist <- fastveh_celldist$results %>%
    rownames_to_column("cell_type") %>%
    mutate(comparison = "Fast vs Chow")

lep_dist <- lepip_celldist$results %>%
    rownames_to_column("cell_type") %>%
    mutate(comparison = "Leptin vs Saline")

all_dist <- bind_rows(hfd_dist, fast_dist, lep_dist) %>%
    rename(estimate = `Dist.`, ci_lo = `95% CI (low)`, ci_hi = `95% CI (upper)`, pval = p.val)

p_dist <- all_dist %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = reorder(cell_type, estimate), y = estimate, fill = comparison)) +
    geom_col(position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.7) +
    geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = ci_lo, ymax = ci_hi),
                  position = position_dodge(width = 0.8), width = 0.2) +
    coord_flip() +
    facet_wrap(~comparison, scales = "free_x") +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    theme(strip.background = element_blank(), legend.position = "none") +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Transcriptional distance")

ggsave(paste0(out_dir, "scdist_all_comparisons.pdf"), plot = p_dist, h = 6, w = 12)

write_csv(all_dist, paste0(out_dir, "scdist_all_results.csv"))
```

## Pearson correlations — fasting vs DIO fold changes per cluster

```{r pearson_all_clusters, fig.width=8, fig.height=6}
diet_de_full <- read.csv(here::here("output_figures/paper/figure2/tables/diet_degenes.csv"))

cor_results <- diet_de_full %>%
    group_by(ct) %>%
    summarise(
        r = cor(logFC.treatmentFast, logFC.treatmentHFD, use = "complete.obs"),
        p = cor.test(logFC.treatmentFast, logFC.treatmentHFD)$p.value,
        n = n(),
        .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(padj = p.adjust(p, method = "BH"))

p_cor <- cor_results %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = reorder(ct, r), y = r, fill = padj < 0.05)) +
    geom_col() +
    coord_flip() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("TRUE" = "#2C3E50", "FALSE" = "grey70")) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, lty = 2) +
    cowplot::theme_cowplot(font_size = BASE_SIZE) +
    labs(x = NULL, y = "Pearson r (Fast vs HFD fold changes)", fill = "FDR<0.05")

ggsave(paste0(out_dir, "pearson_fast_hfd_all_clusters.pdf"), plot = p_cor, h = 6, w = 6)
write_csv(cor_results, paste0(out_dir, "pearson_fast_hfd_all_clusters.csv"))
```
